approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and reduce intelligence-pipe overload without unsafe automation.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub Route Review Triage readback that groups action-route review pressure into safe operator buckets.
constraints: Do not approve, apply, reject, snooze, reroute, or mutate live action routes.
Do not write destination records, backlog cards, Scoper cards, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, or approval records from this readback.
Do not auto-clear, auto-apply, or auto-promote Director/action-route recommendations.
Do not run extraction, source sync, provider/model calls, login, Browserbase, paid/private source work, or external writes.
Do not send Telegram, email, Slack, Agent Feedback, public messages, or Harlan notifications outside the governed ship gate.
Fail proof if any route can be auto-applied or if the readback performs a route/destination/external mutation.
